---
title: "Population of an Old Pear Tree, or, Stories of Insect Life, The From the French of Ernest van Bruyssel.  Edited by the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”."
---

## Population of an Old Pear Tree, or, Stories of Insect Life, The From the French of Ernest van Bruyssel.  Edited by the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1870
**Genre:** Edited translation
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

### Notes

These translations \'edited\' by CMY were not translated by her, but she corrected the text.  This was almost certainly translated by Julian Bargus Yonge;  see the letters to Alexander Macmillan dated

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
